creator: tomasv@megalogika.lt
text:
Ahoj,

alas I can not repeat the problem on a fresh installation of  FreeBSD
7.0-BETA4 and tomcat55 package.

What exact version of Tomcat port/package are you using?

Is your Tomcat (the one that the ps command output shows) really started
by the script? Usually, when started by rc.d script it shows up as 

www    23080  0.0  2.6 190300 26696  ??  Is    5:04PM   0:03.78 [java]

What rc.conf tunables, related to tomcat55, are set?

-- 
Tomas "Verbaitis" Verbaitis ** http://megalogika.lt
